types 
of claims on the PDE record; used to identify specific types of claims with valid values. 

SHORT NAME: SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_1 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_2 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_3 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_4 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_5 

LONG NAME: SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_1 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_2 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_3 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_4 
SUBMSN_TYPE_CD_5 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: AA = 340B Claims 
AB = Split Billing 
AD = Nominal Price 
AF = Synchronization Fill 
AG = Trial Fill 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: These fields were new
